Gianluca di Marzio provides comments from the Napoli chief today in which he confirms the Manchester United winger is on his list. arts.ttl: 'A fresh start for one of the worst signings in Man Utd history'
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony arrived in the summer of 2022 full of promise but he is now on the brink of leaving the club as one of their worst ever signings.

arts.ttl: Where Man United would be without pantomime villain Bruno Fernandes... and what makes Ruben Amorim's unique captain so important - THE SHARPE END
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: It's fair to say that, sometimes, Bruno Fernandes doesn't help himself. A misplaced pass from a team-mate and up go the arms and out comes the sigh.

arts.sum: Man Utd 'STEP UP' pursuit of wonderkid Tyler Dibling Manchester United are getting serious about their pursuit of Southampton wonderkid Tyler Dibling, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Antony gives five-word verdict on Real Betis loan move as £81m Man United flop arrives in Spain to finalise deal
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony has given his verdict on his loan move to Real Betis. The 24-year-old has arrived in Spain as he prepares to finalise his switch to the LaLiga club.
